default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and challenges across multiple client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several projects (Town, Engine, Hyper Growth) are progressing well with content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Urgent fixes needed for Innerwell and AirBite projects, with 250 articles due for Innerwell by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Sentinel-1 project faces challenges with AI-generated content restrictions, requiring careful navigation](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Outreach project shows significant potential for streamlining content refresh processes](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

## Topics

### Client Project Updates

  - [Town: Meeting scheduled for tomorrow despite JD's absence](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Engine: On track with 18 new assignments, 57 URL suggestions, and 8 pieces publishing this week](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Hyper Growth: New blog generated, publishing platform (Substack vs. website) still under discussion](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Biologica: Meeting leadership reassigned to Panzer due to Aida's partial conflict](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Innerwell: Blocked by NJON site issues; urgent fix needed to start content generation](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [AirBite: Requires urgent fix before next week's batch](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Monograph: 9 blogs approved, 4 new blogs in progress, improvements in featured image generation](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Metronome: Content drafting in progress, blocked by early access page setup](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [All: Deep dive completed with John, updated artifacts to be shared](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Okta: Meeting scheduled with Rachel to clarify project scope and efficiencies](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Sentinel-1: AI-generated content restricted for blog, exploring alternative content placement options](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Outreach: Significant potential for content refresh optimization identified](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### SEO Testing Tool Issue

  - [George noticed all sites were gone from SEO testing tool](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Subscription had expired; George to handle resubscription](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Sentinel-1 Project Challenges

  - [AI-generated content not allowed on the blog](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Content options limited to Cybersecurity 101 pages, Vulnerability Database, or potential new resource page](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Careful navigation required due to internal team dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### Outreach Project Potential

  - [Significant room for content refreshing identified](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Current manual process only allows 4-5 refreshes per month](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Opportunity to streamline and automate refresh workflow using GrowthX capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Push for Substack as the publishing platform for Hyper Growth project](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Add Panzer to tomorrow's Biologica meeting](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Evaluate signals from content refreshes to determine strategy for new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Sync with Jason regarding SEO testing tool resubscription](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Share updated artifacts from All project deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Schedule product deep dive for Sentinel-1 project (Marisol to follow up with Drew)](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Coordinate with dev team to build CVE pages for Sentinel-1](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Digest Outreach project information and plan next steps for refresh optimization](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Set up and refine scrunch databases, tagging team members as appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/QN1m7Jf64EcQhjRuDWSg6uqVE__5Y-vm?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

action_items.description: Prep agenda for Biologica mtg tomorrow (15min attendance)
Continue work on Monograph image workflow w/ branding & text
Share updated All artifacts w/ new internal docs & persona info
Meet w/ Rachel (Okta) to clarify needs & efficiencies
DM Drew re: unblocking Tim Wolford product deep dive for Sentinel-1
Coordinate w/ dev team on building CVE pages for Sentinel-1 (8,161 CVEs)
